new_value: All RBS quality fixes implemented: correctness fixes (missing ApiKey.authenticate_by_token, malformed ApplicationController return type, false Scoreable attribute declarations, Twilio RestError.full_message) plus ~100 untyped annotations replaced with concrete types across 24 files.
